description_long: This is a digital representation of an adult male pedestrian, depicted with a well-groomed beard and short hair. He is dressed in a casual, fitted short-sleeve t-shirt with a logo on the left chest and text on the back, paired with slim-fit pants that end just above the ankles. The figure wears low-top sneakers with visible laces, and his arms are relaxed and slightly extended outward. The facial features are stylized but realistic, and the body proportions are natural, suggesting a healthy adult build. The clothing fits closely to the body, and the overall appearance is clean and modern, suitable for an urban environment. No accessories or carried objects are visible, and the posture is upright and neutral.
description: A casually dressed adult male with short hair and a beard, wearing a fitted t-shirt, slim pants, and sneakers, standing upright with arms slightly out. The look is modern and clean, ideal for urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing facial features, chest logo, and relaxed arm position.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile, ear, and the fit of the t-shirt and pants.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back text on the t-shirt and the back of the head and shoes.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile, arm, and the side seam of the pants.
attribute_clothing_type: casual short-sleeve t-shirt and slim-fit pants
